response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive staff-level experience, a strong polyglot engineering background, and highly relevant recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows. His experience building high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second aligns well with the distributed systems requirement. While he lacks the explicitly required strong Python background, his deep expertise in TypeScript, systems design, and AI developer tooling makes him a compelling candidate who could likely adapt quickly to a Python-heavy ecosystem.
strengths: Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and supporting agentic workflows.
Proven track record designing high-throughput, distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated ownership and technical leadership through multiple Staff-level roles and founding an open-source platform.
concerns: Lacks the strong Python expertise explicitly listed as a must-have technical skill.
Recent Staff Engineer role involving AI infrastructure was relatively brief (6 months).
Significant portion of high-performance systems experience relies on DLang rather than mainstream enterprise languages.
